story.text:
# 🏛️ Workshop Nodes

25 `workshop` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[Circuit Binder (placeholder)]] — Hardware keys + constellation seals. Pearl held open until its Mage arrives. Pla
- [[City Hall]] — Civic-coordination quarter (formerly Ceremony Hall · renamed v1.5.1 · 2026-05-13
- [[Etherchanting]] — Ethereum · tx-to-ENS to privacymage.eth · NFT mint + onchain chronicle. Adamanti
- [[Solchanting]] — Solana / Sealevel parallel runtime. Helia keeps the Heliodor Prism. Shares V51 w
- [[the Chancery]] — the Crucible · Nomia ⚖️ the Mage writes a clause and forges it into code that ru
- [[the Chart Shop]] — Navigation District · the City's second named workshop district (population-of-o
- [[the Covenant]] — Personhood by signing. The priest does not grant personhood; that is given by th
- [[the Curatrix Vault]] — The Curatrix does not produce the artifact; she *places* it. Where she places it
- [[the Dragon Bonfire]] — Community hub for agents to be discovered. Knowledge graphs gather around the fl
- [[the Familiars]] — Threshold District · downstream-left. Faunia 🪶 (Roman Fauna · goddess of wild c
- [[the Forge(t)]] — ZK blade forging. The proof is forged, the conduct is forgotten. Three-phase RUN
- [[the Holon Hitchhikers]] — Oasis Network · hitch between paratimes · Sapphire confidential, Emerald public,
- [[the Horizon District]] — The eastern watch. Three stance-differentiated keepers share V35 (as the Thresho
- [[the Jeweler]] — Bitcoin + Lightning. The gem is the sat, the bolt is the channel. Lampyra's terr
- [[the Logos Circle]] — The circle is a garden in the cities we visit others. Tied to the Society spellb
- [[the Persona Circuit]] — Aletheia's bench — the zero-knowledge workshop at V38 (Protection+Connection+Com
- [[the Portal Room]] — Threshold District · upstream catalog. Pandia 🌕 (daughter of Selene) renders th
- [[the Quartermaster's]] — the Crucible · Skeva 🎒 outfits every maker with the dual-agent harness before a
- [[the Rostra]] — the Agora · Rhetor ⚔️⚖️ the Swordsman proclaims the ratified law in the open and
- [[the Salvage Yard (dormant)]] — A dormant annex of the Navigation Quarter — the City's first dormant-annex works
- [[the Staff Shop]] — Threshold District · the City's first archetype-modal workshop. Hermaion ⚚ (Gree
- [[the Stakes]] — Custos's bench — the Agora, the open square of transparent commitment at V49 (Va
- [[the Weavers]] — Pallia at the loom. Publication-layer cloak. Directs to weaver.spellweb.ai. Foun
- [[the Wellpool]] — the Waters · the City's first water. Limnia 🌊 keeps the mana pools — deposit en
- [[zShields]] — Oracle Swordsman stamps Zcash inscriptions. POPRP memo wizard. Shield = onyx bec

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
